description_long: This sculpture depicts a nude male figure standing on a round, ornate pedestal. The figure is shown in a dynamic pose, with one arm extended forward and the other bent, possibly holding an object or gesturing. The anatomical details are well-defined, with visible musculature and a naturalistic stance. The surface of the sculpture appears weathered, with a patina suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal. The base is circular and decorated, providing stability and a sense of grandeur. The overall impression is classical, reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary.
description: A weathered bronze sculpture of a nude male figure in a dynamic pose, standing on a decorated round pedestal.
description_view_0: The back and side of the male figure are visible, showing the extended arm and the detailed musculature of the back and legs.
description_view_1: The sculpture is viewed from behind the pedestal, with the round base dominating the view and the figure's outstretched arm visible above.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile of the figure is shown, highlighting the forward extension of the arm and the detailed legs and torso.
description_view_3: A view from the front and slightly above, showing the face, chest, and the full extension of the arm, as well as the top of the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the background is plain and does not indicate a particular setting.
